---
title: "Robin Bryant"
sortby: "Bryant, Robin"
subtitle: "Undergrad Project Student"
image: RobinBryant.jpg 
started: "Summer 2026"
ended: "current"
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
---
  
```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
  <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
  <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../labmembers.html">People</a></li>
  <!-- <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Alumni</li> -->
  <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
  </nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}

I am an undergraduate Biological Sciences (Human Biosciences) student with interests in evolutionary genetics, bioinformatics, and pathophysiology. I aspire to specialise in pathology. Outside of academics, I enjoy reading, TTRPGs, and hiking.

:::
